title: Cursor pagination over aggregated feed
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.aggregated_cursor_page/1` that returns a cursor-paginated list of `{category, post_count}` ordered by `post_count desc`, with `category_id` as unique tie-breaker. The cursor is `{post_count, category_id}`. Use a group_by + count query as the base, then keyset-filter. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Cursor over an aggregated column is the hardest pagination scenario — must use HAVING for the cursor filter.
